general_info.size_adjustable: An adjustable and removable seat post and a telescoping handlebar stem allows riders to reach a wide range of heights while maintaining comfort and stability.
general_info.folding_capabilities: A foldable design at both the handlebar stem and main frame guarantees your ride will fit into virtually any compact space.

ebike_system.lectric_pwr: Lectric's Pedal Assist Wattage Regulation (PWR) programming allows for an improved Pedal Assist experience by assisting the rider up to a certain power level for each PAS setting, instead of limiting the assistance by speed alone. Learn more about PWR here. Prefer full wattage while you ride? Access the advanced settings of your display to toggle off PWR Programming.
ebike_system.charging: An external charging port provides riders with the option to charge the eBike without removing the battery. The XP Lite comes standard with a 2amp charger for 2-4 hour charging.

drivetrain.drivetrain: 52 x 16 tooth single speed drivetrain makes riding efficient and seamless.
drivetrain.folding_pedals: Push-fold pedals are easily compressed for compact transport.

included_accessories.kickstand: A heavy-duty side-sweeping kickstand located near the chain stay keeps the eBike upright.
included_accessories.accessory_mounting_points: The frame features multiple mounting points throughout the eBike for various accessory combinations.

general_other.one_minute_tool_free_assembly: Simply unfold the stem assembly, insert the stem and handlebars, and unfold the pedals.
general_other.green_packaging: Packaging components are biodegradable and easily recyclable.

free_accessories.name: Safety Lights
free_accessories.detail: An integrated safety system, featuring a headlamp and taillight powered by the battery allows you to be seen at any time of day.

drivetrain.folding_pedals: Push-fold pedals are easily compressed for compact transport.

included_accessories.kickstand: A heavy-duty side-sweeping kickstand located near the chain stay keeps the eBike upright.

free_accessories.name: Safety Lights
free_accessories.detail: An integrated safety system, featuring a headlamp and taillight powered by the battery allows you to be seen at any time of day.

general_info.fully_foldable: A foldable hinge at both the handlebar stem and frame guarantees your ride will fit into virtually any compact space. Remove the front wheel, battery, and the seat post in seconds for easy and lightweight transport.

ebike_system.turn_signals: Alert drivers, riders, and people nearby with turn signals. Simply use the left or right arrows on the button pad to turn on the blinkers on either side of the rear light.
ebike_system.easy_charging: An external charging port provides riders with the option to charge the eBike without removing the battery. The XP Trike2 comes standard with a 2amp charger for 5-7 hour charging, but a 5amp Fast Charger can be purchased separately, which can charge the standard battery in as little as 3 hours.

special_features.5_riding_modes: Five riding modes deliver the speed and power to own the road as a Class 1 or 2 eBike.* New simplified labels, including Eco, Tour, Sport, Sport+, & Turbo, allow riders to choose their riding experience.
special_features.keyless_riding: Turn your bike on and off with the push of a button, and start riding without having the key in the battery! Keys are needed to remove the battery from the bike frame only.

frameset.redesigned_frame: The XP Trike2 is crafted with a hydroformed 6000-series aluminum frame that's ultra-strong and up to 30% lighter than comparable steel frames. The reinforced downtube and re-engineered geometry—featuring a set-back seat tube and lowered rear rack—enhance stability and comfort, especially at higher speeds or on uneven paths.

wheelset.differential_axle: The 2-wheel-drive, all-wheel braking system is made possible by the open, dual-differential axle. Both the motor and the stationary rotor are centered on the axle, providing power and brakes to both rear wheels. This design ensures stability by creating a balanced center of gravity.
wheelset.thru_axle: The front wheel features a thru-axle wheel attachment system for a quick and easy installation. This feature ensures a straight wheel, consistent brake rotor alignment, and handling stability. Remove the wheel in minutes for an easy and lightweight transport.

drivetrain.drivetrain: A 16-tooth single-speed freewheel paired with a forged aluminum, 36-tooth custom chainring makes riding efficient and is the perfect ratio for effortless 20-inch wheel pedaling.

cockpit.telescoping_seat_post: Customize the bike to your perfect size by adjusting the seat post height; simply open the quick-release collar and slide the post to your preferred height and lock it in place by closing the collar.

geometry.payload_capacity: Max: 415 lbs. Never exceed the payload capacity. Distribute weight within the guidelines: Max Rider weight 330 lbs, Max Front Basket Weight 30 lbs, Max Rear Basket Weight 75 lbs.

included_accessories.rear_rack: A rear rack integrated into the bike frame holds up to 75 lbs. and features bosses for mounting various accessory combinations.
included_accessories.fenders: Polypropylene fenders protect you and your ride from debris. The flexible material is damage-resistant and helps ensure long-term durability.

general_other.beginner_preset: If you haven’t been on a bike in a while, the XP Trike2 comes with a power-limiting feature to slow acceleration and limits max speed to 5 mph in riding modes Eco and Tour. Once you get comfortable, you can unlock faster settings.
general_other.hidden_cable_routing: The down tube of the frame houses the main cables for a premium experience at no extra cost.
general_other.green_packaging: Packaging components are biodegradable and easily recyclable. Carefully crafted and engineered so you won’t have to lift any components out of the box.
general_other.one_minute_tool_free_assembly: Simply unfold the stem assembly and frame, insert the stem & handlebars, and quickly attach the front wheel and display screen. Non-essential riding components such as fenders, headlights, and other accessories can be installed at your convenience.

free_accessories.name: Rear Rack
free_accessories.detail: A rear rack integrated into the bike frame holds up to 75 lbs. and features bosses for mounting various accessory combinations.

free_accessories.name: Safety Lights
free_accessories.detail: An integrated safety system, featuring a new bright 90-lumen headlamp with side amber lights and a brake-activated rear light powered by the internal battery, allows you to be seen at any time of day.

general_info.pick_your_pedal_response: Choose between responsive pedaling vs. standard pedaling with an easy adjustment to the settings, switching between a torque or cadence sensor. The torque sensor offers a more natural, smooth feel with intuitive power that responds to your pedal pressure. The cadence sensor provides power with each revolution of the pedals, making it a great option for beginners or anyone looking for a more relaxed ride.

free_accessories.name: Safety Lights
free_accessories.detail: An integrated safety system, featuring a new bright 90-lumen headlamp with side amber lights and a brake-activated rear light powered by the internal battery, allows you to be seen at any time of day.

general_info.fully_foldable: A foldable hinge at both the handlebar stem and frame guarantees your ride will fit into virtually any compact space. Remove the pedals and the seat post in seconds for easy and lightweight transport.

ebike_system.turn_signals: Alert drivers, riders, and people nearby with our turn signals. Simply use the left or right arrows on the button pad to turn on the blinkers on either side of the rear light.
ebike_system.easy_charging: An auxiliary charging port near the bottom bracket provides riders with the option to charge the eBike without removing the battery. The XP4 comes standard with a 2amp charger for 4-6 hour charging, but a 5amp Fast Charger can be purchased separately, which can charge the standard battery in as little as 2 hours.

special_features.5_riding_modes: Five riding modes deliver the speed and power to own the road as a Class 1, 2, or 3 eBike.* New simplified labels, including Eco, Tour, Sport, Sport+, & Turbo, allow riders to choose their riding experience.
special_features.new_keyless_riding: Turn your bike on and off with the push of a button, and start riding without having the key in the battery! Keys are needed to remove the battery from the bike frame only. We’ve listened to our loyal riders, and you can now ride key-free!
special_features.co_pilot_capable: The LevelUp Rack (sold separately) can be added to the integrated rear rack and has a built-in mounting window to easily install children's seats like the Thule Maxx Yepp Seat. If they have outgrown a standard child seat, our Buddy Seat (sold separately) contains an open padded seat, handlebars, and foot pegs that allow you to bring them along for the ride!***

frameset.fully_redesigned_frame: The newly designed, more aesthetic XP4 frame is lightweight and features sturdy 6000 series aluminum with mounting points for various accessory combinations.

drivetrain.drivetrain: An 11-32 tooth, 8-speed freewheel paired with a Shimano Altus derailleur and a below-the-bar trigger shifter allows you to swiftly change gears while riding to create pedaling efficiency and an easier riding experience at higher speeds.
drivetrain.quick_release_pedals: Custom-designed 6000 Series Aluminum quick-release pedals with splined inserts allow for easy, tool-free removal and installation. The new shape of the pedals improves foot traction for an optimal experience.

cockpit.telescoping_seat_post: Customize the bike to your perfect size by adjusting the seat post height; simply open the quick-release collar and slide the post to your preferred height and lock it in place by closing the collar.

included_accessories.folding_kickstand: A heavy-duty steel side-sweeping kickstand located near the chainstay keeps the eBike upright.
included_accessories.fenders: Polypropylene fenders with a flared tail protect you and your ride from debris. The flexible material is damage-resistant and helps ensure long-term durability.

general_other.green_packaging: Packaging components are biodegradable and easily recyclable.

general_other.tested_for_durability: Our eBikes are built with industry-leading safety certifications so you can have peace of mind riding in almost any condition. A US-based bicycle testing lab put the XP4 through the rigorous ISO 4210 standard testing process.

ebike_system.semi_integrated_battery: A removable 48V, 15Ah (720Wh) lithium-ion battery certified to UL 2271, integrated on the down tube of the frame with a color-matched plate, makes for a clean and easily-accessible design.† The XPeak is also certified to UL 2849.
ebike_system.lectric_pwr: Lectric's new Pedal Assist Wattage Regulation+ (PWR+) programming allows for an improved Pedal Assist experience by assisting the rider up to a certain power level for each PAS setting. Learn more about PWR here.
ebike_system.charging: An auxiliary charging port near the bottom bracket provides riders with the option to charge the eBike without removing the battery. The XPeak comes standard with a 2amp charger for 6-8 hour charging but a 5amp Fast Charger can be purchased separately to speed up charging by 250%.

wheelset.thru_axle: The front wheel features a Thru Axle wheel attachment system for a quick and easy installation. This feature ensures a straight wheel, consistent brake rotor alignment, and handling stability. Remove the wheel in minutes for an easy and light-weight transport.

drivetrain.drivetrain: 11-32 tooth, 8-geared freewheel paired with a Shimano Altus derailleur and a thumb-triggered handlebar shifter allows you to swiftly change gears while riding to create pedaling efficiency and an easier riding experience at higher speeds.
drivetrain.removable_pedals: Quick-release pedals easily detach from the bike for compact transport.

cockpit.telescoping_seat_post: An adjustable and removable seat post allows riders to reach a range of heights while maintaining comfort and stability.

geometry.payload_capacity: Max: 330 lbs. Never exceed the payload capacity. Distribute weight within the guidelines: Max Rider weight 330 lbs, Max Rear Rack Weight 60 lbs.

included_accessories.kickstand: A heavy-duty side-sweeping kickstand located near the chain stay keeps the eBike upright.
included_accessories.accessory_mounting_points: The XPeak frame features multiple mounting points throughout the eBike for various accessory combinations.

general_other.hidden_cable_routing: The down tube of the frame houses the main cables for a premium experience at no extra cost.
general_other.green_packaging: Packaging components are biodegradable and easily recyclable.
general_other.assemble_in_less_than_five_minutes: Simply attach the quick-release pedals and install the front wheel via the thru axle, then secure the handlebars with 4 screws.

free_accessories.name: Safety Lights
free_accessories.detail: An integrated safety system, featuring a headlamp and tail light powered by the battery allows you to be seen at any time of day.

free_accessories.detail: An integrated safety system, featuring a headlamp and tail light powered by the battery allows you to be seen at any time of day.

general_info.folding_capabilities: A foldable handlebar stem and adjustable seat height allows the XPedition to slide into compact spaces. Remove the pedals, seatpost, and front wheel in minutes for an easy and light-weight transport.
general_info.din_tested_rated: A US-based bicycle testing lab put the XPedition through the rigorous DIN standard testing process to prove the frame and fork can handle a 450lb maximum payload ride after ride. The XPedition is rated to DIN 79010:2020-02.5.9.5.2.

ebike_system.lectric_pwr: Lectric's new Pedal Assist Wattage Regulation+ (PWR+) programming allows for an improved Pedal Assist experience by assisting the rider up to a certain power level for each PAS setting. Learn more about PWR here.
ebike_system.turn_signals: Alert drivers, riders, and people nearby by indicating which direction you are headed with our new turn signals. Simply use the left or right arrows on the display control pad to trigger a blinking cadence on one side of the rear light.
ebike_system.charging: An external battery allows riders to charge the eBike without removing the battery.The XPedition comes standard with a 2amp charger for 5-7 hour charging but a 5amp Fast Charger can be purchased separately to speed up charging by 250%.

special_features.smart_draining_technology: A dual-battery system coupled with a battery isolator will drain 2 batteries at the same time allowing you to stay at higher voltage longer & reach up to 170 miles, respectively.** The bike will arrive with a terminal cover on the second battery mount but can be quickly removed to add a second battery at any time.

wheelset.thru_axle: The front wheel features a quick-release Thru Axle wheel attachment system for tool-free installation. This feature ensures a straight wheel, consistent brake rotor alignment, and handling stability.

drivetrain.drivetrain: 11-32 tooth, 8-geared freewheel paired with a Shimano Altus derailleur and a thumb-triggered handlebar shifter allows you to swiftly change gears while riding to create pedaling efficiency and an easier riding experience at higher speeds.
drivetrain.removable_pedals: Quick-release pedals easily detach from the bike for compact transport.

cockpit.dual_seat_post: An adjustable and removable seat post with two different expansion points allows riders to reach a wide range of heights while maintaining comfort and stability.

geometry.payload_capacity: Max: 450 lbs. Never exceed the payload capacity. Distribute weight within the guidelines: Max Rider weight 330 lbs, Max Front Basket Weight 30 lbs, Max Rear Rack Weight 300 lbs.

included_accessories.folding_dual_leg_kickstand: A sturdy dual-leg kickstand with a 15+ inch spread located near the bottom bracket ensures the most balanced position for easy loading***. Pushing forward allows you to start riding without having to manually put the kickstand up with precious cargo.
included_accessories.fenders: Polypropolene Fenders protect you and your ride from debris. The rear fender features an integrated side-pane wheel shroud to shield cargo and passengers from the eBikes rotating components.

general_other.hidden_cable_routing: A hollow top tube frame houses the main cables for a premium experience at no extra cost. Cables that may need to be serviced overtime are easily accessible and mounted to the underside of the frame.
general_other.green_packaging: Packaging components are biodegradable and easily recyclable.
general_other.one_minute_tool_free_assembly: Simply attach the quick-release pedals, unfold the handlebar stem, and install the front wheel via the quick-release thru axle.

general_info.pick_your_pedal_response_xperience_switc: Choose between responsive pedaling vs. standard pedaling with an easy adjustment to the settings, switching between a torque and cadence sensor. The torque sensor offers a more natural, smooth feel with intuitive power that responds to your pedal pressure. The cadence sensor provides power with each revolution of the pedals, making it a great option for beginners or anyone looking for a more relaxed ride.

ebike_system.semi_intergated_battery: A removable 48V, 14Ah (672Wh) lithium-ion battery certified to UL 2271, integrated on the down tube of the frame, makes for a clean and easily-accessible design while powering your ride for up to 60 miles on a single charge.*** The XPress2 is also certified to UL 2849.†
ebike_system.turn_signals: Alert drivers, riders, and people nearby with our turn signals. Simply use the left or right arrows on the button pad to turn on the blinkers on either side of the rear light.
ebike_system.easy_charging: An external charging port provides riders with the option to charge the eBike without removing the battery. The XPress2 comes standard with a 2amp charger for 5-7 hour charging, but a 5amp Fast Charger can be purchased separately, which can charge the long-range battery in less than 3 hours.

special_features.5_riding_modes: Five riding modes deliver the speed and power to own the road as a Class 1, 2, or 3 eBike.* New simplified labels, including Eco, Tour, Sport, Sport+, & Turbo, allow riders to choose their riding experience.
special_features.keyless_riding: Turn your bike on and off with the push of a button, and start riding without having the key in the battery! Keys are needed to remove the battery from the bike frame only.

wheelset.thru_axle: The front wheel features a specially designed, ultra-fast thru-axle attachment system for quick, tool-free installation. This design helps ensure precise wheel alignment, consistent brake rotor positioning, and stable handling. Remove the wheel in minutes for easier, more lightweight transport.

drivetrain.drivetrain: An 11-32 tooth, 8-speed freewheel paired with a Shimano Altus derailleur and a below-the-bar trigger shifter allows you to swiftly change gears while riding to create pedaling efficiency and an easier riding experience at higher speeds.
drivetrain.quick_release_pedals: Custom-designed 6000 Series Aluminum quick-release pedals with splined inserts allow for easy, tool-free removal and installation. The new shape of the pedals improves foot traction for an optimal experience.

cockpit.telescoping_seat_post: Customize the bike to your perfect size by adjusting the seat post height; simply open the quick-release collar and slide the post to your preferred height and lock it in place by closing the collar.

geometry.payload_capacity: Max: 330 lbs. Never exceed the payload capacity. Distribute weight within the guidelines: Max Rider weight 330 lbs, Max Rear Rack Weight 30 lbs.

included_accessories.folding_kickstand: A heavy-duty steel side-sweeping kickstand located near the chainstay keeps the eBike upright.

general_other.hidden_cable_routing: The down tube of the frame houses the main cables for a premium experience at no extra cost.
general_other.green_packaging: Packaging components are biodegradable and easily recyclable.
general_other.one_minute_tool_free_assembly: Simply attach the quick-release pedals and install the front wheel via the thru axle.
general_other.tested_for_durability: Our eBikes are built with industry-leading safety certifications so you can have peace of mind riding in almost any condition. A US-based bicycle testing lab put the XPress2 through the rigorous ISO 4210 standard testing process.

free_accessories.name: Safety Lights
free_accessories.detail: An integrated safety system, featuring a new bright 90-lumen headlamp with side amber lights and a brake-activated rear light powered by the internal battery, allows you to be seen at any time of day.
